description: Managing the same external dependency through both WORKSPACE and bzlmod causes conflicting versions and confusing resolution.
body: Failure mode: a dependency is declared in legacy WORKSPACE while bzlmod also pulls it, so two versions enter the graph with unclear precedence. Detection signals: duplicate or conflicting versions of a library at link or runtime; resolution differs between machines; builds break after a partial migration. Do not split one dependency across both systems. Safer fallback: choose one source of truth, migrate the dependency fully to bzlmod with a pinned version in MODULE.bazel, and verify a clean checkout resolves a single consistent version.
